cases.prompt_body: Mission command room with one large front screen showing a diffuse smoke-plume pattern echoing the Challenger failure, seated operator silhouettes below it, status consoles subdued and text-clean, the room remains calm and procedural, pale green monitor glow, smoke-gray bloom confined to the screen, no readable digits, no cracked-glass texture, no exterior launch view

Three-quarter mission control interior, one overhead projection carries a soft smoke field shaped like the failure plume while the operators remain secondary, consoles and annunciators stay technical but unreadable, no graph lines, no text, no cracked display, procedural calm under tense room light

Institutional command room with a large mission screen dominating the frame, the screen holds a diffuse smoke-pattern event instead of a line graph, seated staff remain nearly still below it, technical room stays specific and text-clean, no exterior stack, no fireball, no broken-screen metaphor, restrained failure awareness
